summary: 2 film announcements, 2 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Ali G Movie
film.announcement: New Ali G movie in development announced amid Sacha Baron Cohen's character appearance at Wimbledon.

film.title: Avengers: Doomsday
film.announcement: Concept art revealed showing Robert Downey Jr.'s Doctor Doom design and returning X-Men characters for the upcoming film.

tv.title: Married at First Sight
tv.announcement: Season 20 receives major overhaul with new experts and a returning familiar face joining the cast.

tv.title: Legally Blonde: Elle
tv.announcement: Legally Blonde prequel greenlit as a TV series rather than a film.
